title: Bahrain Charges Intelligence Officer in the Death of a Detainee
summary_full: The officer was charged with assault leading to death, in the case of a man who was accused by Bahraini authorities of espionage during a domestic crackdown tied to the war in Iran.
summary_public: The officer was charged with assault leading to death, in the case of a man who was accused by Bahraini authorities of espionage during a domestic crackdown tied to the war in Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: espionage during a domestic crackdown tied to the war in Iran.
